message:
release: align internal crate dependency pins to 0.2.1

Summary:

- Updates workspace path dependency version constraints from 0.2.0 to 0.2.1 for internal ftui crates.

- Ensures cargo publish verification resolves the new 0.2.1 crate line instead of stale 0.2.0 APIs from crates.io.

- Includes non-publish crates that consume internal workspace crates so local and CI builds remain coherent.
